text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper is real and confirmed across multiple authoritative sources, including the CVPR 2025 Open Access repository and arXiv (2503.11651). The cited author (Jianyuan Wang et al.) matches exactly, venue (CVPR 2025) is correct, and the paper even won the CVPR 2025 Best Paper Award. The title in the reference ("for universal 3d reconstruction") is a minor informal subtitle variation; the official title is "VGGT: Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer."
LINK: https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/CVPR2025/html/Wang_VGGT_Visual_Geometry_Grounded_Transformer_CVPR_2025_paper.html
